era_true.statement: Arthur Dent's house was demolished to make way for a bypass.
The Earth was demolished to make way for a hyperspace bypass.
The answer to the Ultimate Question of Life, the Universe, and Everything is forty-two.
Deep Thought computed the answer to the Ultimate Question over a period of seven and a half million years.
The Earth was a giant computer designed to find the Ultimate Question.
Zaphod Beeblebrox has two heads.
Zaphod Beeblebrox has three arms.
Zaphod Beeblebrox was President of the Imperial Galactic Government.
Ford Prefect is from a small planet somewhere in the vicinity of Betelgeuse.
Ford Prefect chose his name thinking it would be inconspicuous on Earth.
Ford Prefect was a researcher for the Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy.
Ford Prefect spent fifteen years stranded on Earth.
Marvin the Paranoid Android has a brain the size of a planet.
Marvin suffers from severe depression and chronic boredom.
Marvin is fifty thousand times more intelligent than a human.
Marvin was built by the Sirius Cybernetics Corporation.
Marvin waited in a car park for millions of years.
Marvin has a terrible pain in all the diodes down his left side.
Marvin once talked a combat robot into killing itself.
Marvin once talked a spaceship computer into committing suicide.
The Sirius Cybernetics Corporation produces products with Genuine People Personalities.
Trillian's real name is Tricia McMillan.
Zaphod picked up Trillian at a party in Islington.
Arthur Dent wore a dressing gown for much of his interstellar travels.
The Babel fish is a small yellow leech-like creature placed in the ear.
The Babel fish translates any language in the universe.
The existence of the Babel fish was used as proof against the existence of God.
The Vogons are one of the most unpleasant races in the Galaxy.
Vogon poetry is the third worst poetry in the universe.
Prostetnic Vogon Jeltz commanded the Vogon Constructor Fleet that demolished Earth.
The worst poetry in the universe was written by Paula Nancy Millstone Jennings of Sussex.
Pan Galactic Gargle Blasters are the best drink in existence.
Drinking a Pan Galactic Gargle Blaster is like having your brains smashed out by a slice of lemon wrapped round a large gold brick.
Zaphod Beeblebrox invented the Pan Galactic Gargle Blaster.
The Heart of Gold was the first ship to use the Infinite Improbability Drive.
Zaphod Beeblebrox stole the Heart of Gold.
The Infinite Improbability Drive passes through every conceivable point in every conceivable universe simultaneously.
Slartibartfast designed the coastlines of Norway.
Slartibartfast won an award for designing the fjords of Norway.
Magrathea is a planet that manufactured luxury custom-made planets.
Magrathea was believed to be a myth before Arthur Dent visited it.
The mice were the most intelligent species on Earth.
The mice were actually pan-dimensional beings running experiments on humans.
Frankie and Benjy Mouse wanted to extract Arthur Dent's brain.
The mice commissioned the construction of the Earth.
The Ravenous Bugblatter Beast of Traal is so stupid it thinks if you cannot see it, it cannot see you.
A towel is the most massively useful thing an interstellar hitchhiker can have.
The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy has the words "Don't Panic" on its cover.
The Guide outsells the Encyclopedia Galactica because it is slightly cheaper and has the words "Don't Panic" on the cover.
The Restaurant at the End of the Universe is called Milliways.
Milliways is built on the ruins of Frogstar World B.
At Milliways, diners watch the entire universe end while eating dinner.
The main dish at Milliways is an Ameglian Major Cow that wants to be eaten.
Hotblack Desiato is the lead singer of the rock band Disaster Area.
Disaster Area is the loudest rock band in the history of the known universe.
Hotblack Desiato spent a year dead for tax reasons.
Disaster Area's ship is programmed to dive into a sun during concerts.
The Golgafrinchans divided their population into three arks.
The Golgafrinchans sent their useless middle managers, telephone sanitizers, and hairdressers away on the B Ark.
The Golgafrinchans who stayed behind were wiped out by a disease contracted from a dirty telephone.
The B Ark crash-landed on prehistoric Earth.
The Golgafrinchan telephone sanitizers became the ancestors of modern humans.
Fenchurch is the woman Arthur Dent falls in love with.
Fenchurch disappeared from a plane flying over the Atlantic Ocean.
Arthur Dent learned to fly by throwing himself at the ground and missing.
The secret to flying is to distract yourself at the moment of impact with the ground.
God's Final Message to His Creation reads "We apologise for the inconvenience."
Wowbagger the Infinitely Prolonged decided to insult every being in the universe in alphabetical order.
Wowbagger became immortal through an accident involving a particle accelerator and a pair of rubber bands.
Agrajag was a creature who was repeatedly killed by Arthur Dent across multiple reincarnations.
Agrajag was once a bowl of petunias that thought "Oh no, not again" while falling.
The bowl of petunias was brought into existence by the Infinite Improbability Drive.
A sperm whale was also brought into existence by the Infinite Improbability Drive high above Magrathea.
The sperm whale had a brief but philosophical life before hitting the ground.
Zaphod Beeblebrox is Ford Prefect's semi-cousin.
Zaphod and Ford share three of the same mothers.
The Total Perspective Vortex destroys the mind of anyone placed inside it.
The Total Perspective Vortex shows you your true insignificance relative to the entire universe.
Zaphod Beeblebrox survived the Total Perspective Vortex.
Zaphod survived the Total Perspective Vortex because he was in a universe created specifically for him.
Zaphod had part of his brain secretly removed.
Zaphod arranged to have part of his own brain removed before becoming President.
The Point of View gun causes the target to see things from the shooter's point of view.
Trillian used the Point of View gun on Zaphod.
The Point of View gun was commissioned by the Intergalactic Consortium of Angry Housewives.
Eddie is the shipboard computer of the Heart of Gold.
Eddie has an irritatingly cheerful personality.
The Nutrimatic Drinks Dispenser invariably produces a liquid almost entirely unlike tea.
Arthur Dent spent years trying to get a Nutrimatic machine to produce proper tea.
Bistromathics is a way of understanding the behavior of numbers in restaurant situations.
The Bistromath is a spaceship that operates on the principles of bistromathics.
Hactar was a computer that designed the ultimate weapon and then sabotaged it.
The Krikkit Wars nearly destroyed the entire Galaxy.
The people of Krikkit decided to destroy the rest of the universe after seeing the night sky for the first time.
The Wikkit Gate unlocks the Slo-Time envelope surrounding Krikkit.
The Ashes are part of the Wikkit Key.
Marvin's leg was used as part of the Wikkit Key.
Marvin is thirty-seven times older than the universe itself due to time travel.
Marvin's last words were about the first ten million years being the worst, and the second ten million being the worst too.
Marvin read all the books in a spaceship's library and found them depressing.
Marvin parked cars for millions of years at Milliways.
Zaphod Beeblebrox the Fourth is Zaphod's great-grandfather.
Zaphod Beeblebrox the Fourth contacted Zaphod through a séance.
Eccentrica Gallumbits is the triple-breasted whore of Eroticon Six.
Prosser, the man who wanted to demolish Arthur's house, was a direct descendant of Genghis Khan.
Mr. Prosser frequently had visions of horsemen but did not understand why.
The number forty-two was computed by Deep Thought as the answer, but nobody knew the actual question.
Arthur and Ford escaped the Vogon ship by being thrown out of an airlock.
Arthur and Ford were rescued from space by the Heart of Gold within thirty seconds of being ejected.
The probability of being rescued by the Heart of Gold was two to the power of two hundred and seventy-six thousand, seven hundred and nine to one against.
Trillian brought mice with her when she left Earth with Zaphod.
The Dentrassi are a race of cooks who allowed Ford and Arthur aboard the Vogon ship.
Vogons will not save their own grandmothers from the Ravenous Bugblatter Beast of Traal without orders in triplicate.
The Guide describes Earth with the single word "Harmless."
Ford Prefect spent fifteen years researching Earth and updated the entry to "Mostly Harmless."
The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy is an electronic book with a hundred billion pages.
Mostly Harmless is the phrase that replaced "Harmless" as Earth's entry in the Guide.
Random Dent is the daughter of Arthur Dent and Trillian.
Random Dent was conceived using Arthur's DNA stored at a donor bank.
Stavro Mueller Beta is a club where Arthur worked as a sandwich maker.

era_false.statement: The Answer to the Ultimate Question of Life, the Universe, and Everything is forty-three.
Arthur Dent is a native of the planet Betelgeuse Five.
Zaphod Beeblebrox has three heads and one arm.
The Vogons are renowned across the galaxy for their beautiful poetry.
Marvin the Paranoid Android is perpetually cheerful and optimistic about existence.
Ford Prefect chose his Earth alias from a popular brand of television set.
The Heart of Gold runs on the Infinite Improbability Drive, which was invented by Zaphod Beeblebrox.
Trillian's real name is Tracy McMillan.
Deep Thought was built to calculate the Answer and the Question simultaneously.
The Earth was constructed by the Magratheans as a giant computer to find the Answer.
Slartibartfast won an award for designing the coastlines of Africa.
The Ravenous Bugblatter Beast of Traal is one of the most intelligent creatures in the galaxy.
The Babel fish translates languages by feeding on sound waves.
Ford Prefect is from a small planet in the vicinity of Alpha Centauri.
The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy is published by Megadodo Publications of Ursa Minor Alpha.
Zaphod Beeblebrox was elected President of the Galaxy through a legitimate democratic process he respected.
Arthur Dent eagerly embraced interstellar travel from the very beginning of his journey.
The Vogons destroyed Earth to make way for a hyperspace expressway bypass.
Prostetnic Vogon Jeltz secretly admired human culture and regretted destroying Earth.
The mice were actually the least intelligent species on Earth.
Marvin has a brain the size of a small moon.
The Restaurant at the End of the Universe is located at the spatial end of the universe.
Hotblack Desiato is the lead singer of the band Disaster Area.
Disaster Area is considered the quietest band in the galaxy.
The Total Perspective Vortex shows people how important they are in the grand scheme of things, boosting their confidence.
Zaphod Beeblebrox stole the Heart of Gold accidentally while attending a museum tour.
Ford Prefect was stranded on Earth for twenty years before the Vogon demolition fleet arrived.
The Nutrimatic drinks dispenser produces excellent tea that Arthur Dent thoroughly enjoys.
Fenchurch is Arthur Dent's childhood sweetheart from his hometown in England.
The number forty-two was calculated by Deep Thought in just seven days.
The Golgafrinchans sent their most valuable citizens away on the B Ark.
Random Dent is the daughter of Arthur Dent and Trillian, conceived naturally on the Heart of Gold.
Wowbagger the Infinitely Prolonged dedicates his immortality to complimenting every being in the universe alphabetically.
The Pan Galactic Gargle Blaster tastes like a mild cup of herbal tea.
Zaphod Beeblebrox served two full terms as Galactic President before retiring peacefully.
Eddie the shipboard computer of the Heart of Gold has a deeply melancholic personality.
The dolphins left Earth without giving any warning to humanity.
Marvin spent millions of years parking cars in a garage on the planet Preliumtarn.
The Ultimate Question of Life, the Universe, and Everything was successfully discovered by Deep Thought.
Arthur Dent learned to fly by throwing himself at the ground and missing.
Ford Prefect's original name is easily pronounceable by human vocal cords.
The Guide's entry for Earth originally read "Mostly Harmless" before Ford expanded it.
Agrajag is a being who has been repeatedly saved by Arthur Dent across multiple reincarnations.
Slartibartfast is deeply passionate about designing fjords for planets in tropical regions.
The Krikkit Wars began because the people of Krikkit loved and welcomed the rest of the universe.
Hactar was a supercomputer who encouraged peace and discouraged the creation of weapons.
Trillian left Earth with Zaphod from a pub in downtown London.
The Bistromath operates on the perfectly logical and predictable mathematics of restaurant bill division.
Zaphod Beeblebrox has a third arm that he was born with naturally.
The Sirius Cybernetics Corporation is universally praised for its flawless products and customer service.
Marvin successfully transfers his personality into the Heart of Gold's main computer permanently.
Rob McKenna is a truck driver who is unaware of his effect on weather patterns.
Bowerick Wowbagger gained his immortality through a deliberate scientific experiment he volunteered for.
The people of Krikkit could always see the stars from their planet's surface.
Arthur Dent's house was being demolished to build a shopping center.
Prostetnic Vogon Jeltz is known for his slim, graceful physique and gentle demeanor.
The Jatravartids of Viltvodle VI believe the universe was sneezed out of a nose called the Great Green Arkleseizure.
Ford Prefect is a human who pretends to be an alien for attention.
The Guide describes the Pan Galactic Gargle Blaster as the third best drink in existence.
Benjy Mouse and Frankie Mouse wanted to extract Arthur's liver to find the Ultimate Question.
Deep Thought recommended the construction of a computer called Middle Earth to find the Question.
The Infinite Improbability Drive was developed after years of careful, methodical scientific research.
Vroomfondel and Majikthise are philosophers who enthusiastically supported Deep Thought's work.
Lunkwill and Fook are the two mice who programmed Deep Thought.
Trillian has a degree in mathematics and French literature.
The Heart of Gold is shaped like a running shoe.
Zaphod invented the Pan Galactic Gargle Blaster during his presidency.
Arthur Dent willingly left Earth to explore the galaxy with Ford Prefect.
The Dentrassis are the Vogon cooks who hate hitchhikers and refuse to help them.
Eccentrica Gallumbits is the triple-breasted whore of Eroticon Seven.
Marvin dies peacefully at the end of the first book, content with his existence.
The Shoe Event Horizon is a theoretical point where shoe shops outnumber all other shops and civilization collapses.
Magrathea was a planet that manufactured luxury starships for the wealthy.
The whale that appeared above Magrathea had a long and fulfilling life.
The bowl of petunias thought "Oh no, not again" because it had been a bowl of petunias many times before.
Zaphod Beeblebrox removed one of his own heads to become Galactic President.
Ford Prefect carries a towel because the Guide recommends always carrying a spare change of clothes.
The Vogon Constructor Fleet gave Earth a two-year warning before demolition.
Trillian met Zaphod at a party in New York City.
Arthur Dent spent most of his time on the Heart of Gold feeling perfectly comfortable and at home.
The Guide is less popular than the Encyclopedia Galactica because it is more expensive.
Roosta is a character who refuses to carry a towel on principle.
Humma Kavula is a missionary who worships Zaphod Beeblebrox as a deity.
The Krikkiters built robots that looked like tall, elegant humanoids made of gold.
Prak laughed himself to death after being injected with too much truth serum and told everything that was true.
The ruler of the universe lives in a grand palace and makes decisions with absolute certainty.
Zarniwoop trapped Zaphod in a virtual universe created inside the Total Perspective Vortex.
The longest-running party in the galaxy takes place on the planet Kakrafoon.
Thor the Thunder God and Arthur Dent become close allies who never quarrel.
Stavro Mueller owns a restaurant called Beta, located in the middle of the galaxy.
Arthur Dent learns to make a proper cup of tea very early in his galactic travels.
The Somebody Else's Problem field works by making objects invisible through advanced cloaking technology.
Lintilla is a single unique archaeologist Arthur meets on the planet Brontitall.
The Haggunenons of Vicissitus III are known for their completely stable and unchanging physical forms.
Ford Prefect's semi-cousin is Zaphod Beeblebrox, meaning they share two of the same mothers.
The planet Bethselamin is famous for encouraging mass tourism without any restrictions.
Milliways serves meals that are unaware they are about to be eaten.
The Grebulons are an alien race with perfect memory who know exactly why they came to monitor Earth.
Marvin once talked an army of Frogstar fighters into surrendering by telling them jokes.
Zaphod Beeblebrox had his second head added surgically to increase his intelligence.
The Silastic Armorfiends of Striterax were a peaceful civilization known for diplomacy and compromise.
Random Dent grew up on Earth with both her parents in a stable household.
Oolon Colluphid wrote the bestselling book "Everything You Always Wanted to Know About Guilt But Were Afraid to Find Out."
The planet Nano was where Arthur Dent finally settled down permanently and lived happily.
Prosser, the man who wanted to demolish Arthur's house, claimed descent from Genghis Khan and was fully aware of it.
The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy has the words "DON'T FORGET YOUR TOWEL" inscribed on its cover.
Trillian is originally from the United States and studied at Harvard University.
The Infinite Improbability Drive turns the Heart of Gold into a penguin at one point.
Ford Prefect's entry for Earth in the Guide was expanded from "Harmless" to "Quite Interesting."
Deep Thought took seven and a half thousand years to compute the Answer.
Blagulon Kappa is the planet where Arthur and Ford first land after leaving Earth.
The Dentrassis love Vogon cuisine and consider it the finest in the galaxy.
Disaster Area's ship is programmed to fly directly into a star as part of their light show.
Fenchurch disappears permanently during a hyperspace jump while traveling with Arthur to Stavro Mueller Beta.
Zaphod Beeblebrox has three ex-wives who all speak fondly of him.
The Krikkit robots carry bats that are actually components of the Wikkit Gate.
Max Quordlepleen is the host at the Restaurant at the End of the Universe who performs stand-up comedy.
Marvin's left side is replaced with spare parts from a battle tank on Argabuthon.
The planet Lamuella is where Arthur Dent becomes a celebrated king ruling over thousands.
Marvin the Paranoid Android was built by the Sirius Cybernetics Corporation with an intentionally limited lifespan of fifty years.

modern_true.statement: The Great Wall of China is visible from low Earth orbit under certain conditions.
DNA was first identified by Friedrich Miescher in 1869.
The Amazon River discharges more water than any other river on Earth.
Tokyo is the most populous metropolitan area in the world.
Penicillin was discovered by Alexander Fleming in 1928.
The Berlin Wall fell on November 9, 1989.
Light travels at 299,792,458 meters per second in a vacuum.
The human body contains 206 bones in adulthood.
Mount Everest stands 8,849 meters above sea level.
The Soviet Union dissolved in December 1991.
Water molecules consist of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.
The Sahara Desert is the largest hot desert on Earth.
Nelson Mandela was released from prison on February 11, 1990.
The speed of sound in dry air at 20 degrees Celsius is 343 meters per second.
Australia is both a country and a continent.
The transistor was invented at Bell Labs in 1947.
Mars has two moons named Phobos and Deimos.
The French Revolution began in 1789.
Greenland is the largest island on Earth.
The human genome contains over three billion base pairs.
The Mariana Trench is the deepest known point in the ocean.
India gained independence from British rule in 1947.
Diamonds are composed of carbon atoms arranged in a crystal lattice.
The Nile River flows through eleven African countries.
The first successful human heart transplant was performed in 1967 by Christiaan Barnard.
Russia spans eleven time zones.
Photosynthesis converts carbon dioxide and water into glucose and oxygen.
The Panama Canal connects the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans.
Pluto was reclassified as a dwarf planet in 2006.
The Roman Empire fell in 476 CE.
Helium is the second most abundant element in the observable universe.
The Great Barrier Reef is located off the coast of Queensland, Australia.
The first atomic bomb was detonated on July 16, 1945, in New Mexico.
Antarctica has no permanent human residents.
The printing press was invented by Johannes Gutenberg around 1440.
Jupiter is the largest planet in the solar system.
The Titanic sank on April 15, 1912.
Octopuses have three hearts and blue blood.
The Dead Sea is the lowest point on Earth's surface.
The Wright brothers achieved powered flight on December 17, 1903.
Gold has the atomic number 79.
Lake Baikal in Siberia is the deepest freshwater lake on Earth.
The Black Death killed an estimated one-third of Europe's population in the 14th century.
Sharks have existed for over 400 million years.
The Suez Canal was opened in 1869.
Mitochondria have their own DNA separate from nuclear DNA.
Vatican City is the smallest country in the world by area.
The first photograph was taken by Joseph Nicéphore Niépce in 1826.
The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
Insulin was first used to treat diabetes in 1922.
The human brain contains roughly 86 billion neurons.
The Magna Carta was signed in 1215.
Venus rotates in the opposite direction to most planets in the solar system.
The Chernobyl nuclear disaster occurred on April 26, 1986.
Honey does not spoil when stored in sealed containers.
The Himalayas were formed by the collision of the Indian and Eurasian tectonic plates.
The first email was sent by Ray Tomlinson in 1971.
Elephants are the largest living land animals.
The Treaty of Versailles was signed in 1919.
Saturn's rings are composed primarily of ice particles and rocky debris.
The human eye can distinguish between millions of different colors.
Bangladesh is one of the most densely populated countries on Earth.
The smallpox vaccine was developed by Edward Jenner in 1796.
The Caspian Sea is the largest enclosed inland body of water on Earth.
The Apollo 11 mission landed humans on the Moon on July 20, 1969.
Neutron stars are the densest known stellar objects.
The Rosetta Stone was discovered in 1799 in Egypt.
Bananas are naturally radioactive due to their potassium content.
The Trans-Siberian Railway is the longest railway line in the world.
The first programmable computer was the Z3, built by Konrad Zuse in 1941.
The human heart beats over 100,000 times per day.
The Galápagos Islands are located in the Pacific Ocean west of Ecuador.
The Korean War began on June 25, 1950.
Glass is an amorphous solid, not a crystalline one.
The Amazon Rainforest produces a significant portion of Earth's atmospheric oxygen.
The first successful organ transplant was a kidney transplant performed in 1954.
Mercury is the closest planet to the Sun.
The Ottoman Empire lasted from 1299 to 1922.
Tardigrades can survive extreme temperatures, radiation, and the vacuum of space.
The Strait of Malacca is one of the most important shipping lanes in the world.
The periodic table contains 118 confirmed elements.
The Gutenberg Bible was the first major book printed using movable type in Europe.
Coral reefs support more species per unit area than any other marine environment.
The first World War began in 1914 and ended in 1918.
Sound cannot travel through a vacuum.
The Atacama Desert in Chile is the driest non-polar desert on Earth.
The first successful cloning of a mammal produced Dolly the sheep in 1996.
The Earth's core is primarily composed of iron and nickel.
Indonesia is the world's largest archipelago nation.
The Voyager 1 spacecraft entered interstellar space in 2012.
The Black Sea is connected to the Mediterranean Sea through the Bosphorus Strait.
Plate tectonics cause earthquakes, volcanic eruptions, and mountain formation.
The Hubble Space Telescope was launched into orbit in 1990.
The human body is composed of roughly 60 percent water by mass.
The Mongol Empire was the largest contiguous land empire in history.
Lightning reaches temperatures hotter than the surface of the Sun.
The Sumatran rhinoceros is the smallest living rhinoceros species.
The first commercial flight of a jet airliner occurred in 1952.
The Earth orbits the Sun at a distance of roughly 150 million kilometers.
The construction of the International Space Station began in 1998.
The Congo River is the deepest river in the world.
Antibiotics are ineffective against viral infections.
The Renaissance began in Italy during the 14th century.
The blue whale is the largest animal known to have ever existed.
The Krakatoa eruption of 1883 was one of the deadliest volcanic events in recorded history.
The first vaccine for polio was developed by Jonas Salk in 1955.
The Earth's atmosphere is composed primarily of nitrogen and oxygen.
The Silk Road connected East Asia to the Mediterranean for centuries.
The speed of light in a vacuum is the universal speed limit.
The Andes is the longest continental mountain range on Earth.
The first nuclear power plant to generate electricity opened in Obninsk, Russia, in 1954.
The Sun accounts for over 99 percent of the total mass of the solar system.
The Rwandan genocide occurred in 1994.
The human nose can detect over one trillion distinct scents.
The Danube River flows through ten European countries.
The first successful powered submarine was built by John Philip Holland in 1897.
The Earth's magnetic field protects the planet from solar wind.
The Sistine Chapel ceiling was painted by Michelangelo between 1508 and 1512.
The global human population exceeded eight billion in 2022.
Tectonic plates move at rates comparable to the growth rate of human fingernails.
